mainEntity.name: What costs $5,000-$10,000 monthly for AI visibility services in Los Angeles?
mainEntity.text: What costs $5,000-$10,000 monthly for AI visibility services in Los Angeles?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comprehensive packages include AI audits, GEO content creation, PR distribution, directory management, and schema implementation tailored to LA jurisdictions like Century City courts.

suggestedAnswer.text: LA agencies charge $7k avg for 12-month retainers covering Perplexity audits, 20+ optimized pages, and review campaigns. ROI: 15-25 qualified leads/month. Cheaper DIY risks inconsistency; enterprise firms pay $15k+ for custom AI training data. Disclose fees transparently to avoid bar ethics issues.
